reviews.review_description: For what it is, it’s great. Very limited but fun. I’m looking forward to a more conventional plane. Kids love it and have a blast. I like the interactions and simple flight model.

It says that a plane and a helicopter will be unlocked once their sales reach a certain point. I don’t know about you, but I think their sales numbers are their problem, not ours. I want to use the simulated fixed wing plane, not the motor glider (actually a weight shift microlight). I’m going to be requesting a refund. Frankly, I think it’s a bit cheeky and against their own interests to be restricting the game based on sales.

I give two stars for trying. The graphics are not bad, but that is where the praise stops. As a professional pilot, I do know what an aeroplane is supposed to feel like, and this is not it. The controls are highly unresponsive and they didn’t even bother to add a throttle. “Wings 2” might not be perfect either, but it is a lot closer and much more fun.
